title: WsSecurityConfig
description: WS-Security configuration properties for Apache CXF WSS4J interceptors.

action.description: Space-separated list of WS-Security actions to apply.

user.description: Username for UsernameToken or keystore alias.

passwordCallbackClass.description: Fully qualified class name of the javax.security.auth.callback.CallbackHandler for password retrieval.

signatureKeyIdentifier.description: Key identifier type for XML Signature.

signaturePropFile.description: Path to the signature keystore properties file.

encryptionPropFile.description: Path to the encryption keystore properties file.

encryptionUser.description: Alias of the recipient public key for encryption.
